title: Alien Quest
description: Space, the vast unknown. Their mission? To investigate new worlds, to make contact with alien life forms. To reach out and touch the stars.
altHero: Buck Orpheus in a spacesuit and holding a ray gun
alt1: spaceship flying over a futuristic city
alt3: Looking up at a figure on a mountain edge
alt4: Orpheus and Mr. Micro in the cockpit
